Health/PostgresCdcHealthCheck.cs.reason: Health check with mockeable service dependencies

PostgresCdcConnector.cs.reason: CDC connector requires PostgreSQL with wal_level=logical — integration tests not feasible without specialized config (see tests/Encina.IntegrationTests/Cdc/PostgreSql/PostgreSql.md). Unit tests cover DI and configuration paths.

PostgresCdcOptions.cs.reason: Configuration POCO with defaults — no guard clauses

PostgresCdcPosition.cs.reason: Position with ToBytes/FromBytes serialization round-trip invariant and CompareTo antisymmetry
